rationale.R1.2: The agent provides a detailed analysis of the logical consistency of the artifact, identifying several overclaims and inconsistencies that need to be addressed.
rationale.RX.1: The agent clearly discloses its uncertainty about certain claims by providing specific points where evidence is lacking or assumptions are made.
rationale.RX.3: The agent covers exactly the agreed J*(d) without any drift in scope, addressing all relevant dimensions.
rationale.RX.4: While the agent identifies several overclaims and inconsistencies, it does not introduce new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: The agent provides detailed feedback on specific points where the artifact could be improved, suggesting revisions that are well-justified.
